nasb.text: David prepared large quantities of iron to make the nails for the doors of the gates and for the clamps, and more bronze than could be weighed;

esv.text: David also provided great quantities of iron for nails for the doors of the gates and for clamps, as well as bronze in quantities beyond weighing,

cnv.text: 又預備了無數的香柏木，因為西頓人和推羅人給大衛運來了很多香柏木。

ccb.text: 大卫预备了大量的铁，用来做门扇的钉子和钩子，又预备了不计其数的铜。
